name: Crock Pot Italian Beef
recipeIngredient: 4 pounds pot roast (or two small chuck roasts for a total of 5 lbs)
1 package Good Seasons Italian Salad dressing mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the pot roast in the crockpot.
2. Add 3 cups of water and stir to combine with the beef.
3. Sprinkle in 1 teaspoon each of salt, pepper, oregano, onion salt, garlic salt, and basil.
4. Add the Italian Salad dressing mix according to package instructions.
5. (Optional) Chop and add a diced onion to the crockpot.
6. Cook on low for all day.
7. Once cooked, shred the beef using two forks.
8. Return the shredded beef to the broth for an additional 15 minutes.
9. Serve the shredded beef on buns or French/Italian bread or rolls.
Freezing tip: After making this dish, refrigerate it until the fat rises to the top. Peel off the fat layer before freezing the dish again. This frozen dish tastes even better the second time around and freezes well.
